CVE-2014-4330.title: The Dumper method in Data::Dumper before 2.154, as used in Perl 5 ...
CVE-2014-4330.description: The Dumper method in Data::Dumper before 2.154, as used in Perl 5.20.1 and earlier, allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (stack consumption and crash) via an Array-Reference with many nested Array-References, which triggers a large number of recursive calls to the DD_dump function.

CVE-2023-47038.title: A vulnerability was found in perl 5.30.0 through 5.38.0. This iss ...
CVE-2023-47038.description: A vulnerability was found in perl 5.30.0 through 5.38.0. This issue occurs when a crafted regular expression is compiled by perl, which can allow an attacker controlled byte buffer overflow in a heap allocated buffer.
